newModules.description: Tears localized fractures in spacetime fabric at the target location, causing catastrophic quantum decoherence that disintegrates matter regardless of conventional shielding.

newModules.name: Existence Anchor
newModules.description: Projects a reinforced ontological field that locks the ship's matter into a single deterministic state, providing near-immunity to quantum decoherence and reality manipulation attacks.

newModules.name: Neutronium Plate
newModules.description: Hull plating forged from degenerate neutron star matter, offering extraordinary density and kinetic resistance that renders conventional projectile weapons nearly ineffective.

newModules.name: Omniscient Targeting Grid
newModules.description: Distributed sensor mesh spanning multiple dimensions that provides near-perfect target prediction, extending weapon engagement envelopes far beyond conventional sensor limits.
